questions.question: BiteDash is an online food delivery platform.
questions.explanation: According to the study material, BiteDash is an innovative online food delivery platform.

questions.question: The current architecture of BiteDash is microservices-based.
questions.explanation: The study material states that the current architecture of BiteDash is monolithic, not microservices-based.

questions.question: Microservices architecture can improve scalability.
questions.explanation: According to the study material, microservices architecture allows for better scalability by enabling individual services to scale independently.

questions.question: Deployments in a monolithic setup are easy and safe.
questions.explanation: The study material highlights that deployments in a monolithic setup are difficult and risky, as changes to one component can impact the entire system.

questions.question: Microservices architecture enables fault isolation.
questions.explanation: According to the study material, microservices architecture enables each service to operate independently, ensuring that failures in one service do not impact others.
